message:
test(doom): add comprehensive tests for palette.rs and tables.rs

palette.rs: +17 tests covering color lookup, WAD loading, lit_color,
colormap identity/monotonicity/specials, light_to_colormap distance/light
relationships, wall_color, light_factor edge cases, Default trait parity.

tables.rs: +18 tests covering trigonometric identities (pythagorean,
odd/even symmetry, phase shift), quadrant tangent signs, angle wrapping,
radians roundtrip boundaries, and repeated-access determinism.

Closes bd-2xl4e.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
